rationale: This is primarily a prose guideline skill that references local rule files (rules/*.md and AGENTS.md) for detailed explanations, so the agent will read those alongside the user's React/Next.js source files. When refactoring per the guidelines, it will write modified component/page files (.tsx/.ts/.jsx/.js) and likely inspect package.json/next.config for bundle/import context. The skill itself declares no APIs, network calls, or CLI tools, so no hosts or subprocesses are expected from the skill alone (any build/test commands would be task-driven, not skill-driven).
